title: S&P Global (SPGI)Intrinsic Value
description: We ran a full discounted cash flow on S&P Global using FY2025 actuals. One number. Every assumption disclosed. Here's what SPGI is really worth.

fcfGrowth.title: FCF Growth Rate (Y1-Y5)
fcfGrowth.rationale:
" data-astro-cid-3j3wgl3w>
S&P Global is an incredible compounder. Revenue grew from $8.3B in 2021 to $15.3B in 2025. With robust recurring revenue from indices and Market Intelligence, pricing power ensures that inflationary costs can be passed on seamlessly. 10% cash flow growth models continued synergies and organic expansion without being overly aggressive.
